primaryResidence.name: Welders House
primaryResidence.address: Welders House, Welders Lane, near Jordans
primaryResidence.notes: Osbourne family estate since 1993. Ozzy spent his final years here after the 2022-2023 move back to UK from LA. He died here July 22, 2025 and is buried on the grounds near the lake per his final wish (private funeral July 31, 2025). Sharon has made this her permanent base post-Ozzy. Kelly relocated here with son Sidney after Ozzy's death because she 'can't leave' her father's resting place and enrolled Sidney in UK school.

secondaryResidences.name: Hancock Park Mansion (FORMER - LISTED FOR SALE)
secondaryResidences.status: Listed for $17 million after Ozzy's death; Sharon cleared it out in late 2025
secondaryResidences.notes: Former Ozzy + Sharon LA home. Reports indicate Sharon may get a smaller LA apartment to maintain a US footprint but is not permanently living here.

secondaryResidences.name: Jack Osbourne's Studio City Home

coordinates.note: Studio City centroid - exact address not public

secondaryResidences.notes: Jack has lived here since 2020 with wife Aree Gearhart (married Sept 2023 at San Ysidro Ranch). Second daughter with Aree born March 5, 2026 (his 5th daughter total).

secondaryResidences.name: Aimee Osbourne's Los Feliz Oaks Home
secondaryResidences.address: 5699 Holly Oak Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90068
secondaryResidences.notes: Aimee is the most private Osbourne sibling. Currently lists this as her home but has it on the market; future location uncertain with family center of gravity shifting to UK.

perPersonNotes.sharon-osbourne: Primary: Welders House, Jordans, Buckinghamshire, UK. Cleared out Hancock Park LA mansion late 2025 (listed for $17M). May get a small LA apartment but UK is home base.
perPersonNotes.kelly-osbourne: Primary: Welders House, Buckinghamshire, UK (relocated post-Ozzy death, 2025-2026). Son Sidney enrolled in UK school. Split from fiance Sid Wilson in March 2026. Has tried to repurchase the old Beverly Hills Osbournes reality-show home - owners declined.
perPersonNotes.jack-osbourne: Studio City, Los Angeles, CA (since 2020). $3.5M gated home with wife Aree Gearhart and their daughters. Remains LA-based.
perPersonNotes.aimee-osbourne: Los Feliz Oaks, Los Angeles, CA (5699 Holly Oak Dr). Home currently listed for sale at $4.35M; next location unconfirmed. Maintains distance from family's public life.
perPersonNotes.ozzy-osbourne: DECEASED July 22, 2025 at Welders House. Buried on the grounds near the lake (private funeral July 31, 2025).
